title: Process-first target contract for Advisor Review and Approval

source_definition.task: Define target surfaces, state machine, role guards, payload visibility, audit/evidence requirements and acceptance criteria for Advisor Review and Approval.
definition_of_done: Acceptance criteria cover positive and negative paths.
UI, service and test boundaries are named.

contract_decision.reason: The older EPIC-10 report specified shared typed status primitives only. The current masterplan EPIC-10 requires a DOMAIN-F Advisor Review and Approval contract.

target_surfaces.primary_job: Select one advisor review package and open the scoped recommendation detail without implying approval or release.
target_surfaces.viewport_rule: Queue, selected recommendation context, blocker and one primary next action must fit without scrolling in the target viewport.

target_surfaces.primary_job: Review one recommendation, compare evidence-backed options, request evidence, return to analyst or approve only to compliance pending.
target_surfaces.viewport_rule: Recommendation identity, option comparison, evidence blocker and advisor action rail must fit without scrolling in the target viewport.

payload_visibility_policy.client_safe_payload: Compliance-released projection only. Advisor review and advisor approval surfaces are internal/advisor-only.
payload_visibility_policy.internal_payload: Internal rationale, advisor notes, compliance notes, draft internals and workflow debug fields must not appear in client-safe payloads.

stop_if_needed: new API route instead of current typed workflow route
advisor approval mapped to compliance release
